purpose: Stores user inquiries sent to listing owners from listing views.

important_fields.name: id
important_fields.note: Primary inquiry identifier used for confirmation/status views.

important_fields.name: user_id
important_fields.note: Identifies the user who submitted the inquiry.

important_fields.name: listing_id
important_fields.note: Associates inquiry to exactly one listing.

important_fields.name: status
important_fields.note: Tracks inquiry lifecycle such as confirmed/open/closed.

important_fields.name: message
important_fields.note: User inquiry content with validation constraints.

notes: Inquiry should be blocked when listing is not accepting inquiries.
Use dedupe rule for rapid duplicate submissions.
